tu1.entityChunkNote: vanilla --forceUpgrade rewrites entity chunks only when DFU changed them, so untouched chunks legitimately keep the source DataVersion; the game DFUs entity chunks per chunk at load (DataFixTypes.ENTITY_CHUNK), and the bake preserves per-chunk DataVersions on the wrappers
